nasb.text: “This is the offering that you shall offer: a sixth of an ephah from a homer of wheat; a sixth of an ephah from a homer of barley;

esv.text: “This is the offering that you shall make: one sixth of an ephah from each homer of wheat, and one sixth of an ephah from each homer of barley,

cnv.text: “你們所當獻的供物是這樣：一‘賀梅珥’小麥，要獻一‘伊法’的六分之一；一‘賀梅珥’大麥，要獻一‘伊法’的六分之一。

ccb.text: “‘以下是你们应当献的供物，每一贺梅珥小麦要献上六分之一伊法，每一贺梅珥大麦也要献上六分之一伊法。
